mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_task ( task_name, user_id, task_type, env_id, gpu_required, priority, dataset_id, base_model_id, hyperparameters, command, status, submitted_at ) VALUES ( #{taskName}, #{userId}, #{taskType}, #{envId}, #{gpuRequired}, #{priority}, #{datasetId}, #{baseModelId}, #{hyperparameters}, #{command}, #{status}, NOW() )
